untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks within a decile relative to peer group (small-cap universe) and identifying calendar month (January). The allowed indicators lack: (1) cross-sectional ranking capability, (2) market-cap filtering, (3) explicit calendar month detection. The '1 calendar year' lookback and decile-based selection are portfolio-construction rules, not single-instrument technical conditions. Additionally, AUTHOR_SILENT on threshold, half_life, and sharpe metrics prevents precise parameterization.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using negative 1-year returns as a proxy for 'worst prior-year performers', but this loses the critical decile-ranking and small-cap universe filtering logic. Entry restricted to early January (hold_days_max=31) and exit uses 20-day SMA crossover as a mechanical reversal proxy. This translation is incomplete without portfolio ranking infrastructure.
